title: Door to Kneeling
cue: Play as candidate moves from door to kneeling position.

title: Kneeling to WM
cue: Play as candidate moves from kneeling to WM.

title: WM to JW
cue: Play as candidate moves from WM to JW.

title: JW to SW
cue: Play as candidate moves from JW to SW.

title: Properly Prepared
cue: Play when candidate is reported properly prepared to WM.

title: WM to JW (Prep)
cue: Play as candidate passes from WM to JW.

title: JW to SW (Prep)
cue: Play as candidate passes from JW to SW.

title: SW to Advance
cue: Play after SW instructs candidate to advance.

title: Kneel
cue: Play when candidate kneels for the obligation.

title: Keep Thy
cue: Play during the solemn support segment.

title: Lap after Obligation
cue: Play for perambulation directly following the obligation.

title: Secrets to JW
cue: Play as candidate goes to present secrets to JW.

title: JW to SW (Secrets)
cue: Play as candidate moves from JW to SW.

title: After Badge Extension
cue: Play immediately following the badge extension address.

title: After WTs
cue: Play after the Working Tools address is completed.

title: After Final to WM
cue: Play as candidate is conducted to the WM after final address.

title: WM to Saluting Base
cue: Play as candidate moves from WM to the saluting base.

title: Leaving Lodge Room
cue: Play as the candidate leaves the lodge room.
